---
title: "Getting Started with Quarto"
author: "Your Name"
date: "2024-01-15"
categories: [quarto, tutorial]
description: "A brief introduction to writing documents with Quarto."
---

# What is Quarto?

Quarto is an open-source scientific and technical publishing system built on
Pandoc. It allows you to create dynamic documents, websites, presentations,
and books with code and text together.

## Why Use Quarto?

- **Reproducible** — code and output live in the same file
- **Multi-language** — supports R, Python, Julia, and Observable JS
- **Multiple outputs** — render to HTML, PDF, Word, and more
- **Easy publishing** — deploy to GitHub Pages, Quarto Pub, Netlify, etc.

## A Simple Example

```r
summary(cars)
```

That's it — your code runs and the output is embedded automatically!
